hero.badge: AL TARIQ AL LAMEA GROUP — LIBYA
hero.title: Industrial-Grade Automotive Care & Distribution
hero.subtitle: Advanced Local Manufacturing. Certified Global Supply Chain. Exclusive Distribution.

pillars.productionDesc: Operating state-of-the-art facilities to produce certified automotive fluids and care chemicals at scale.
pillars.importationDesc: Securing and importing elite international automotive brands tailored for the North African climate.
pillars.representationDesc: Acting as the sole certified distributor for leading global automotive chemical manufacturers in Libya.

products.washDesc: Industrial-grade active foams, touchless detergents, and high-volume cleaning agents engineered for high-traffic service stations.
products.fluidsDesc: OEM-compliant coolants (G12, G13) and essential fluids formulated specifically to withstand extreme temperature variations.
products.protectionDesc: Professional ceramic coatings, sealants, and premium waxes designed for specialized detailing centers and high-end automotive care.

brands.title: The Strategic Bridge Between Global Leaders and Libya
brands.becomePartner: For International Manufacturers requiring Libyan Market Entry →

production.pricingDesc: Leveraging local manufacturing to provide highly competitive, stable pricing without currency fluctuation risks.
production.jobsDesc: Investing in local infrastructure and skilled technical workforce development.
production.hubDesc: Positioning Libya as a central logistical access point for broader North African distribution.

distributor.label: FOR INTERNATIONAL MANUFACTURERS
distributor.title: Your Strategic Gateway to the Libyan Market
distributor.desc: AL LAMEA provides international manufacturers with immediate access to a robust B2B network, dedicated logistics, and unparalleled market penetration across Libya.

contact.text: Whether you operate a commercial service network or represent an international brand seeking market entry, our commercial team is ready to assist you.
